name: The Slow Petition
specialty: A team of skilled investigators, specializing in solving complex cases that have confounded others, often involving the supernatural.

members.name: Lysander Vorenus
members.note: A man with a scar running down his left cheek, earned during a failed mission that led to the loss of his left arm, replaced with a mechanical one.

members.name: Elias Whisperwind
members.note: A tall, lean elf with silver hair and green eyes, known for his exceptional tracking skills and his mysterious, reclusive nature.

members.name: Nix Thunderfoot
members.note: A young tiefling woman with fiery red skin and horns, who has a reputation for her unorthodox, but effective, spellcasting techniques.

members.name: Darius Stonefist
members.note: A gruff, burly dwarf with a thick beard and a metal plate covering the right side of his face, lost in a rift accident.

visual: Dressed in black leather and heavy coats, they move with a purposeful, cautious stride through the Undercity. Each member carries a signature weapon, and their group is easily identified by a silver falcon emblem on their clothing.
reputation_note: Whispers in the Undercity claim they are former members of the Argent Blades, disavowed for unorthodox methods and a thirst for justice that borders on obsession.
